headlines.title: Why Maine’s Sandy Shorelines Turn Jagged
headlines.summary: Differences in the underlying bedrock and how rivers distribute sediment make the coastlines west of Portland look unlike those northeast of the city.

headlines.title: NASA Sets Briefings for SpaceX Crew-13 Mission to Space Station
headlines.summary: NASA and its partners will discuss the upcoming crew rotation mission to the International Space Station during a pair of news conferences on Monday, Aug. 3, from the agency’s Johnson Space Center in Houston. Mission lea
